---
title: "Briana Maximino | Marketing Strategy Portfolio"
echo: false
---

<div class="hero">

# Briana Maximino  
### Marketing Strategy | Sports Marketing | Brand Engagement  

I explore how brands build emotional relevance through strategy, culture, and audience experience.  
My work focuses on sports, innovation-driven brands, and experiential marketing concepts.

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary">View Marketing Projects</a>
<a href="resume.html" class="btn-secondary">View Resume</a>
</div>

</div>

---

## Marketing Focus  

My portfolio explores how organizations build meaningful relationships with audiences through strategy, consumer insight, and experience-driven marketing initiatives.

Primary areas of interest:

- Sports Marketing  
- Brand Strategy  
- Consumer Behavior  
- Campaign Development  
- Digital Engagement  

---

## Core Skills  

- Marketing Strategy  
- Consumer Insights  
- Campaign Planning  
- Brand Positioning  
- Market Research  
- Social Media Strategy  
- Google Analytics (GA4)  
- Excel Data Analysis  

## Analytics & Measurement Approach  

My marketing work emphasizes data-informed decision making, audience insight development, and performance evaluation using analytical frameworks.

Key focus areas include:

- Measuring engagement trends across digital platforms  
- Evaluating campaign performance indicators  
- Understanding audience behavior patterns  
- Applying data insights to improve marketing strategy outcomes  

### Sample Engagement Analysis  

| Metric | Insight |
|--------|--------|
| Social Media Engagement | High responsiveness to experiential content |
| Audience Retention | Stronger with community-driven campaigns |
| Brand Interaction | Increased with interactive digital formats |
| Campaign Reach | Improved through influencer collaboration |
---

### Engagement Trend Example  

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

engagement_data <- data.frame(
  Campaign_Phase = c("Pre Campaign", "Launch", "Mid Campaign", "Post Campaign"),
  Engagement_Score = c(45, 65, 78, 72)
)

ggplot(engagement_data, aes(x = Campaign_Phase, y = Engagement_Score, group = 1)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Projected Audience Engagement Trend",
    x = "Campaign Phase",
    y = "Engagement Index"
  )
```

## Portfolio Overview  

This portfolio reflects an evolving exploration of marketing strategy, brand experience, and audience engagement in contemporary digital environments.

---

*This portfolio reflects ongoing academic and professional development in marketing strategy and consumer engagement.*
